summary: AI Suggestions feature for Content Studio fully verified end-to-end. Backend: all 23 pytest tests pass (19 regression + 4 new TestSuggest tests). Frontend: full DJ flow validated via Playwright through public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL — login → composer → template → suggestions panel (yellow/amber dashed) → 'Dame 10 ideas' → 10 suggestion cards rendered → button text flips to 'Otras 10 ideas' → click suggestion 0 → /dj/generate produces text containing [CAPTION]/[HASHTAGS]/[CTA]. AI ideation is real (Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations, ~5-15s per call).
critical_code_review_comments: /app/backend/server.py is now 1775 lines — exceeds the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into routers (e.g. routers/auth.py, routers/dj.py, routers/admin.py) and moving CONTENT_TEMPLATES/SUGGESTION_PROMPTS into a constants module. This will help future maintainability and testability.
dj_suggest currently calls Claude even when EMERGENT_KEY is missing only after the template check, but raises 500 on missing key — return 503 (service unavailable) for clearer client semantics.

Suggestion cards in DjStudio.jsx render free-form LLM output inside a button: ensure title/inputs are properly escaped (React already escapes by default with text content, so OK — but verify no dangerouslySetInnerHTML is added later).
The /api/dj/suggest endpoint has no rate-limiting; a malicious DJ could exhaust the EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget via repeated 'Otras 10 ideas' clicks. Consider a per-user 60s cooldown or daily quota.

JSON parsing fallback uses regex `\[\s*{.*}\s*\]` with re.DOTALL — fragile if Claude ever embeds JSON arrays in commentary. Current strict prompt mitigates it, but consider using a dedicated JSON-mode-style parser (e.g. tolerantjson) or instructing Claude to wrap output in unique delimiters.
seed_data_creation: None — only ephemeral suggestions and one /dj/generate response, no draft persisted by frontend test (didn't click Guardar).
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Suggestion feature (POST /api/dj/suggest) is live and validated. Endpoint accepts {template_type} only, returns {suggestions:[{title,inputs}]*10, template_type}. Server filters inputs keys to those defined in CONTENT_TEMPLATES[template_type].fields, so non-matching keys (or LLM hallucinated keys) are silently dropped. For poll template, ~80%+ suggestions correctly include both 'question' and 'options' keys. Frontend testids: dj-new-draft-btn, dj-template-{key}, dj-inputs-form, dj-suggestions-panel, dj-suggest-btn, dj-suggestions-list, dj-suggestion-{0..9}, dj-text-area. Each /api/dj/suggest call takes 5-15s; UI shows 'Buscando ideas…' loader. Login flow: localStorage Bearer token (rl_access_token + rl_user) — already validated. Note: in login form, email field may auto-prefill 'admin@radiolatina.fm' (from saved data); use Ctrl+A + Delete + type to safely overwrite when testing as DJ.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Backend regression and new endpoint tests all green; frontend flow renders all expected testids and produces valid AI output.
